title: Magit's Vanilla Modpack
description: A simple modpack with a focus on game optimization
body:
# 🌲 Magit's Vanilla Modpack

This modpack is designed to enhance your Minecraft experience by combining performance optimization, building convenience, shader support, and new visual improvements. It ensures smooth gameplay, extended customization options, and a more atmospheric game world.  

### Features:  
- **FPS Optimization:** Mods like Sodium and Lithium make the game faster and more stable.  
- **Graphics Enhancements:** Shader support (BSL, Complementary), dynamic lighting (LambDynamicLights), and improved visuals from Better Clouds, ModelFix, Simple Fog Control, and Stendhal (adds artistic visual effects and aesthetic tweaks).  
- **Building and Schematics:** Tools like Litematica, Axiom, SchematicPreview (preview builds in the world), and Pochatok (structure and block placement support). 
- **Atmosphere & Aesthetics:** Falling Leaves and Particle Rain enhance immersion with animated nature and weather particles.
- **Additional Functionality:**
Zoomify – smooth, configurable zoom.
Voice Chat, a handy world map, and protection from chat reports.
ImagineBook – better mod documentation via a book-style UI.
Mod Menu and ImagineBook make mod settings easier to access and read.
The perfect choice for players who want to make Minecraft more comfortable and visually appealing without sacrificing performance.

### Added mods (A–Z):

1. **Action Bar Info** – Simply shows your coordinates.
2. **AlinLib** – A required library for other mods to function.
3. **Axiom** – A helper mod for easier building and placement.
4. **Better Clouds** – Improves the look of vanilla clouds for a softer sky.
5. **Better Statistics Screen** – Gives a cleaner and more detailed view of player statistics.
6. **BSL Shaders** – High-quality shaders for realistic lighting and effects.
7. **Cloth Config API** – A library that powers config menus for other mods.
8. **Complementary Shaders - Reimagined** – Balanced shaders with great visuals and performance.
9. **Dynamic FPS** – Reduces resource usage when the game is out of focus.
10. **Entity Culling** – Boosts performance by skipping rendering of unseen entities.
11. **Fabric API** – Core modding library for Fabric mods.
12. **Fabric Language Kotlin** – Enables Kotlin language support for Fabric.
13. **Falling Leaves** – Adds atmospheric falling leaves to forests.
14. **Freecam (Modrinth Edition)** – Lets you move the camera freely without moving your player.
15. **ImagineBook** – Adds in-game books used by other mods to show guides or content.
16. **Iris Shaders** – Enables shaders with Sodium compatibility.
17. **LambDynamicLights** – Adds dynamic lighting from torches, mobs, and more.
18. **Litematica** – Allows you to create and transfer building schematics across worlds.
19. **Lithium** – Improves game performance on a logic level (e.g. AI, block updates).
20. **MaLiLib** – A required library for building-related mods like Litematica.
21. **Mod Menu** – Adds a mod list and config button to the title screen.
22. **ModelFix** – Fixes visual bugs in 3D models of blocks and items.
23. **No Chat Reports** – Disables chat report system (does **not** preserve privacy).
24. **Particle Rain** – Adds soft ambient particles like ash, fog, or dust to the air.
25. **Pochatok** – A utility mod to help with structured building layouts.
26. **Polytone** – Adds more flexibility to resource packs and style overrides.
27. **Reese's Sodium Options** – Adds additional settings for Sodium users.
28. **ReplayMod** – Records gameplay for cinematic or time-lapse replays.
29. **SchematicPreview** – Lets you preview schematics in-world before building.
30. **Shulker Box Tooltip** – Shows shulker box contents directly in the inventory.
31. **Simple Fog Control** – Allows customization or removal of in-game fog.
32. **Simple Voice Chat** – Adds proximity voice chat to multiplayer games.
33. **Sodium** – Major client-side performance boost for rendering.
34. **Sodium Extra** – Adds extra features and toggles to Sodium.
35. **Stendhal** – Adds stylistic visual changes for a more artistic atmosphere.
36. **TCDCommons API** – A shared code library used by mods like Better Statistics.
37. **Text Placeholder API** – Allows text placeholders in other mod interfaces.
38. **Xaero's World Map** – Just a convenient and detailed world map.
39. **YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)** – A modern UI library for mod configuration.
40. **Zoomify** – Adds smooth zoom with adjustable controls.
